description:
Operating Area: Croatia

Our Bubbles is another exceptional 76 ft sailing yacht from CNB shipyard which attracts with her sleek lines, spacious teak deck and robust carbon mast and boom.

Equipped with North Sails sailing inventory, she gives equal pleasure under the full sails, as anchored in one of secluded bays along Croatian Adriatic, while you can enjoy in many different water activities using different water equipment on board or simply rest in the shade of cockpit or sunbath at the front area.

The interior of the ship is full of light, with white furniture and elegant upholstery. Layout of saloon seating is cleverly designed, so it can easily transform from dining area to welcoming bar lounge where you can enjoy in the company of your friends or family with a glass of good wine, while watching TV, or simply enjoying in a good sound of some contemporary music.

Far forward and away from the action, the owner's suite feels blissfully secluded, where you can give yourself a good night rest or relax reading some good book. The two main guest cabins are also forward of the deck saloon. Both can be converted between double and twin formats, and each has en-suite facilities. The stern side of the boat is focused on the galley – this is a large and superbly organized workspace that will facilitate catering to the highest of standards. There is a double/twin cabin for crew accommodation, and a smaller cabin right forward  is dedicated to (sail) storage.

The crew consists of a captain and stewardess who are both excellent and experienced sailing athletes competing at the highest sailing events around globe, but with good background in hospitality services both are fully capable of cater all your needs.

The name "Bubbles" symbolizes the champagne lifestyle - elegant, celebratory, and full of joy, offering a luxurious and sparkling experience on the water.

The name "Bubbles" evokes the elegance and celebratory spirit of champagne, reflecting the luxurious lifestyle aboard this 76ft sailing yacht. With sleek lines, spacious decks, and an inviting interior, "Bubbles" oers both thrilling sailing and relaxing moments in the Adriatic, embodying the perfect blend of adventure and indulgence.

blueprint.name: BUBBLES
tenders: Dinghy: 395 Sportjet Williams with composite bottom and capacity of 6 passengers (Propulsion engine of 90HP)

crew.name: Goran Ivanković
crew.bio:
Croatian

A seasoned skipper with over two decades of sailing, boat maintenance, and sail racing expertise. Proven track record in managing yachts up to 100 BRT, including sailboats, catamarans, and motor yachts.

Adept at leading crews, maintaining vessels in peak condition, and delivering exceptional maritime experiences.

Passionate about sailing and dedicated to providing safe, enjoyable, and memorable sailing experiences. Strong leadership and problem-solving skills, with a commitment to maintaining the highest safety and service standards.

crew.name: Marija Anđela De Micheli Vitturi
crew.bio:
Born in 1996 in Split, Croatia, Marija Anđela developed a deep passion for sailing from a young age. She began her sailing journey at 11, starting in an Optimist, and has been on the water ever since, gaining experience across a wide range of boats. Over the years, she competed in three different Olympic classes, participating in World and European Cups, as well as World and European Championships.
At just 15, she started working in the charter industry as a boat cleaner, returning each season until, at 18, she earned her Category B boat captain certification. From there, she transitioned into working as a stewardess, quickly gaining invaluable experience. By the age of 26, Marija Anđela expanded her qualifications, obtaining a Yachtmaster certification (up to 30 BT) and taking on the role of skipper.
In addition to her work in the charter industry, Marija Anđela has worked as a coach in sailing schools, training kids under 16 and juniors under 23 in various classes. Known for her calm demeanor and exceptional skills in navigation, sailing, organization, cooking, and cleaning, she brings a well-rounded, professional approach to everything she does.
